Meta.title: Multicargo — Global Freight Forwarder | Since 2007
Meta.description: Logistics chaos? Multicargo is your dedicated trade department — air, sea, rail & road from Asia, the Americas, Israel and beyond. 15 years. 6 offices. One call.

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from your first message to cargo at your door. No specialist knowledge required.
HowItWorks.footer: Works for 1 pallet or 100 containers. From China, Israel, UAE, USA, Brazil — anywhere in the world.

step1.title: Submit Your Request
step1.desc: Share your route, cargo type, weight and preferred delivery mode. No forms — just a message or a call to your personal manager.

step2.title: Get a Route Proposal
step2.desc: Tell us your cargo details and we'll analyse your case — origin, destination, cargo type, urgency — and come back with the most efficient route, mode, and cost breakdown. No guesswork. Pure expertise.

step3.title: We Handle Everything
step3.desc: From pickup to final delivery — Multicargo manages the full chain: booking, customs clearance, tracking and documentation. You stay focused on your business.

About.title: To make international logistics for business <hl>transparent</hl>, predictable, and free of bureaucracy.
About.body: Multicargo is your outsourced foreign trade department. We handle sourcing, shipping, customs, and last-mile delivery — from any supplier, in any country. Asia, the Americas, Israel, Brazil, Canada — wherever your supply chain begins, we take it from there. One partner. Full control. Zero chaos.

e1.title: Start of the Journey
e1.desc: Formation of the core team. Commencement of practice in multimodal transport and creation of agent networks in China and Europe.

e2.title: Multicargo Brand
e2.desc: Transformation into an independent logistics operator. Launch of direct lines and complex turnkey foreign trade services.

e3.title: Ecosystem
e3.desc: A fine-tuned mechanism: ocean hubs, air agents, warehouses in the EU, and in-house customs consulting.

Network.mission: From Shenzhen to Singapore. From São Paulo to Tel Aviv. From Toronto to Ho Chi Minh City. We've built the routes, learned the regulations, and made the contacts — so you don't have to. Your supply chain starts wherever your supplier is. We take it from there.

warsaw.address: Poland, 02-146 Warsaw, Wirażowa St, 35, Cargo Terminal

shenzhen.address: China, 518048 Shenzhen, Futian District, Fuzhong 3rd Rd, 16

air.title: Air Freight
air.short: Fast air delivery of cargo of any complexity worldwide. Optimal routes and guaranteed delivery times for your business.
air.full: Organization of charter flights, express delivery of high-value cargo, and consolidation at key air hubs. Full support from pickup to customs clearance at the destination airport.

sea.title: Sea Freight
sea.short: Reliable sea freight: container (FCL) and consolidated (LCL) cargo. Cooperation with all major ports worldwide.
sea.full: Optimal freight rates, container tracking, and port forwarding. We ensure the supply of empty equipment and timely return after unloading.

road.title: Road Transport
road.short: Efficient coverage of Europe and Ukraine. From one pallet to full trucks with 24/7 tracking.
road.full: Our own network of proven carriers, LTL and FTL service. Transportation of dangerous (ADR) and temperature-controlled cargo (reefers). Prompt dispatch of vehicles for loading.

rail.title: Rail Freight
rail.short: Stable and cost-effective Eurasian rail routes. Direct trains from China to Europe.
rail.full: The golden mean between air speed and sea cost. Regular container trains, high cargo safety, and fixed departure schedules.

lcl.title: LCL & Groupage
lcl.short: Cost-effective delivery of small shipments in consolidated containers and trucks.
lcl.full:
An ideal solution for businesses that do not require a full container or truck. We collect cargo from different senders at our consolidation warehouses in Europe and Asia, form a single batch, and send it to the destination.

You only pay for the volume your product occupies. We handle all paperwork, reloading, and warehouse accounting, ensuring regular departures and predictable transit times.

oversized.title: Oversized Cargo
oversized.short: Project logistics for super-heavy and oversized objects. Complex engineering solutions.
oversized.full: Development of securing schemes, obtaining special permits, and escort of oversized cargo. Transport of industrial equipment, agricultural and construction machinery.

importer.title: Tech. Importer EU/UKR
importer.short: Full support of foreign trade transactions: financial and technical support in Europe and Ukraine.
importer.full: Procurement outsourcing, payments to suppliers, currency control, and preparation of all transport documents. We take on the importer's risks.

courier.title: Courier Services
courier.short: Express solutions for parcels and documents. Door-to-door with minimal transit time.
courier.full: Global coverage through partnership with market leaders in courier services. Special rates for delivery of commercial samples and critical spare parts.

handling.title: Port/Air Handling
handling.short: Professional cargo handling in major European hubs. Control of reloading and warehousing.
handling.full: Class A warehouse services in the ports of Gdansk, Gdynia, Hamburg. Reloading from containers to tilt trucks, palletizing, labeling, and secure storage.

customs.title: Customs Clearance
customs.short: Prompt customs clearance and tariff classification. Minimization of risks and delays.
customs.full: Expert selection of HS codes, preparation of declarations, and support with customs authorities 24/7. We ensure clearance without unnecessary downtime and additional costs.

Relocants.title: Moving to a new country?
Relocants.subtitle: Personal relocation & belongings shipping made simple

Careers.lead: The logistics market is borderless. So is our team.
Careers.body: We work with sales professionals and agents remotely — from Kyiv, Warsaw, Valencia, or anywhere else. If you know how to open doors and close deals in freight, we have the infrastructure to back you up.

flexible.title: Flexible Formats
flexible.desc: Remote work and transparent cooperation formats for your comfort.

resources.title: Our Resources
resources.desc: Strong back office, fine-tuned supply chains, and agent networks in China & EU.

geography.title: Geography Without Borders
geography.desc: For a sales expert, location does not matter. You get access to all opportunities of the ecosystem.

Partners.lead: Multicargo is not just a logistics company — it's a platform.
Partners.body: We're open to long-term partnerships with agents, freight forwarders, carriers, and customs brokers who share our values: reliability, transparency, and mutual growth.

winwin.title: Win-Win Approach
winwin.desc: We create conditions where each chain participant gets maximum benefit and growth.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: Impeccable financial discipline and strict fulfillment of all taken commitments.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Development
infrastructure.desc: Ready for joint projects to expand warehouse capacity and new logistics routes.

Downloads.title: Downloads & FAQ
Downloads.subtitle: Forms, agreements and answers to the most common questions
Downloads.toast: Document in preparation. Contact us for the latest version.

q1.q: Do you work only with large companies?
q1.a: No. We work from a single box to a full container. LCL (groupage) service is specifically designed for businesses that ship small volumes.

q2.q: Do you work only with China?
q2.a: No. We handle imports from any country — China, Israel, UAE, USA, Brazil, Canada, Vietnam, India and more.

q3.q: Can you be our official importer if we don't have a legal entity in the EU?
q3.a: Yes. Our Tech. Importer service allows us to act as the official importer of record on your behalf in Poland, Spain or any other EU country.

q4.q: What is the minimum shipment size?
q4.a: There is no minimum. We handle courier parcels from 1kg and full containers of any size. You pay only for the volume or weight your cargo occupies.

fcl.desc: Your cargo fills the entire container. Most cost-effective for large shipments.

lcl.desc: Your cargo shares a container with others. You pay only for your volume (per CBM).

cbm.desc: Unit of cargo volume measurement. 1 CBM = 1m × 1m × 1m.

awb.desc: The main document for air freight. Confirms the contract of carriage and serves as a cargo receipt.

bl.desc: The main document for sea freight. Confirms ownership of the cargo — whoever holds it owns the goods.

cmr.desc: Mandatory document for every international road shipment. Confirms the contract between shipper, carrier and consignee.

t1.desc: EU customs transit document. Allows cargo to move through EU countries without paying import duties until it reaches the final customs office.

exw.desc: Incoterm: seller prepares goods at their warehouse. All transport costs and risks are the buyer's responsibility from that point.

fob.desc: Incoterm: seller loads cargo onto the vessel. From that point, costs and risks transfer to the buyer.

hs.desc: International product classification code. Determines customs duty rates. Wrong code = delays and fines.

eta.desc: ETA — Estimated Time of Arrival. ETD — Estimated Time of Departure. Standard shipping schedule terms.

demurrage.desc: Penalty charged for keeping a container at port beyond the free time allowed. Accumulates daily — can be expensive.
